name: resume-job-search-agent
description: AI-powered resume scoring and job search agent with multi-board integration

scripts.help:
echo 'Available commands:
  npm run test:apis      - Test API configuration
  npm run search         - Search jobs (use -- --help for options)
  npm run example:resume - Run resume scoring examples
  npm run example:jobs   - Run job search examples
  npm test              - Run unit tests
  npm run build         - Compile TypeScript'
